description_long: This object is a compact, black shotgun with a modern, tactical design. The frame and slide are constructed from a dark, matte-finished material, likely metal or high-strength polymer, with a slightly glossy sheen on the upper surfaces. The grip is ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling, and the trigger guard is squared and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is short and integrated into the upper receiver, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall profile is streamlined for ease of use in close-quarters environments. There are no visible external magazines, pumps, or levers, suggesting a semi-automatic action. The object is designed for portability and quick deployment, making it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, black tactical shotgun with a short barrel, ergonomic grip, and squared trigger guard, featuring a sleek, modern design. The surface is mostly matte with some glossy highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the short barrel, ergonomic grip, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the width of the upper receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with clear visibility of the grip and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide and grip, showing the alignment of the sights and the rear of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, robust, medium-sized with no finger grooves or reinforcement
